page.title: Jet Ski Rental Benalmadena | Boat Rental Marbella

data.meta_description: Jet ski rental Benalmadena from €749 for 2h. Ride from Puerto Banús along the Costa del Sol with a guide. Book your Sea-Doo GTX now.
data.summary: Rent a jet ski in Benalmadena from Boat Rental Marbella, departing Puerto Banús. Our Sea-Doo GTX jet ski seats 3 and includes a guide, fuel, and safety gear.
key_facts: Sea-Doo GTX jet ski, 3.4m, seats 3 passengers, departs Puerto Banús.
Pricing from €749 for 2 hours, includes skipper (guide), fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and IVA.
Ride along the coast from Puerto Banús to Benalmadena and beyond.
No licence required – guided tours only, single jet ski per booking.
Includes water, soft drinks, beer, and light snacks on board.
Safety equipment provided: life jackets, radio, and first aid kit.
Book via WhatsApp for availability and custom durations.

faq.q: How much does jet ski rental in Benalmadena cost?
faq.a: Our Sea-Doo GTX jet ski rental starts at €749 for 2 hours. This includes a guide, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA. Longer durations are available on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Benalmadena?
faq.a: No licence is required for our guided jet ski tours. You ride with a qualified guide who leads the route and ensures safety. The jet ski is for one group only – not a fleet of multiple skis.

faq.q: Where does the jet ski tour depart from?
faq.a: All jet ski rentals depart from Puerto Banús Marina, about 15 minutes by car from Benalmadena. We meet at the boat base inside the marina. Exact meeting point is provided after booking.

faq.q: How many people can ride on the Sea-Doo GTX?
faq.a: The Sea-Doo GTX seats up to 3 passengers. It is a 3.4-metre jet ski with a 1,630cc engine. Ideal for couples or small groups. Children must be accompanied by an adult.

faq.q: Can I ride from Benalmadena to Marbella or Puerto Banús?
faq.a: Yes. Our standard route heads west from Puerto Banús past Marbella's Golden Mile, La Concha mountain backdrop, and along the coast. You can also request a route toward Benalmadena, subject to sea conditions.

faq.q: What is included in the jet ski rental price?
faq.a: The price includes a licensed guide, fuel, life jackets, insurance, Spanish IVA (21%), and a cooler with water, soft drinks, beer, and light snacks. No hidden extras.

faq.q: How do I book a jet ski in Benalmadena?
faq.a: Contact us directly via WhatsApp to check availability and confirm your booking. We require a deposit to secure the time slot. Same-day bookings are possible if the jet ski is available.

faq.q: What is the best time of year for jet ski rental in Benalmadena?
faq.a: The season runs from April to October, with peak conditions in July and August when water temperatures reach 24°C. May and September offer lighter crowds and calm seas. Winter rentals are possible but weather-dependent.

data.body_html:
Jet ski rental in Benalmadena gives you a fast, fun way to explore the Costa del Sol coastline. Our Sea-Doo GTX jet ski departs from Puerto Banús, just 15 minutes from Benalmadena, and includes a guide, fuel, drinks, and insurance. Whether you want to cruise past Marbella's Golden Mile or head toward Benalmadena's marina, this is a straightforward way to get on the water without a licence.

Jet Ski Rental Benalmadena – Prices and Options

Our Sea-Doo GTX jet ski (3.4m, 3 seats) is available for guided tours starting at €749 for 2 hours. This price includes a licensed guide, fuel, life jackets, insurance, and 21% IVA. Longer durations are available on request – contact us via WhatsApp for custom quotes. The rental is for a single jet ski; we do not offer multiple skis or fleet packages.

What’s Included in Your Jet Ski Rental

  • Licensed guide leads the tour
  • Fuel for the full duration
  • Life jackets, radio, and first aid kit
  • Cooler with water, soft drinks, beer, and light snacks
  • Full insurance and Spanish IVA (21%)
  • No hidden fees or extra charges

Where You’ll Ride – Benalmadena to Puerto Banús

Your tour starts at Puerto Banús Marina. From there, you ride west along the coast, passing Marbella's Golden Mile, the La Concha mountain backdrop, and the exclusive villas of Río Verde. Depending on sea conditions, you can head east toward Benalmadena’s marina and the Cabopino dunes. The route is flexible – just let your guide know your preference.

Sea-Doo GTX – Specs and Performance

The Sea-Doo GTX is a 3.4-metre jet ski with a 1,630cc Rotax engine. It seats up to 3 passengers and offers a smooth, stable ride even in moderate chop. Top speed is around 60 km/h, but your guide will adjust pace to your comfort level. The jet ski is maintained to high standards and includes a fuel tank sufficient for 2+ hours of riding.

How to Book Your Jet Ski in Benalmadena

Booking is simple: send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, time, and number of riders. We’ll confirm availability and send payment details for a deposit. Balance is payable on arrival. Same-day bookings are possible if the jet ski is free. For larger groups, consider our boat rental Marbella options – many of our boats include jet ski add-ons.

Best Time for Jet Ski Rental in Benalmadena

The prime season runs from April to October. July and August offer the warmest water (24°C) and longest daylight. May and September are quieter with calm seas. Winter rentals are possible but depend on weather – check with us before booking. Morning slots (10:00–12:00) have the flattest water; afternoon sessions get more sun.

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does jet ski rental in Benalmadena cost?

Our Sea-Doo GTX jet ski rental starts at €749 for 2 hours. This includes a guide, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA. Longer durations are available on request via WhatsApp.

Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Benalmadena?

No licence is required for our guided jet ski tours. You ride with a qualified guide who leads the route and ensures safety. The jet ski is for one group only – not a fleet of multiple skis.

Where does the jet ski tour depart from?

All jet ski rentals depart from Puerto Banús Marina, about 15 minutes by car from Benalmadena. We meet at the boat base inside the marina. Exact meeting point is provided after booking.

How many people can ride on the Sea-Doo GTX?

The Sea-Doo GTX seats up to 3 passengers. It is a 3.4-metre jet ski with a 1,630cc engine. Ideal for couples or small groups. Children must be accompanied by an adult.

Can I ride from Benalmadena to Marbella or Puerto Banús?

Yes. Our standard route heads west from Puerto Banús past Marbella's Golden Mile, La Concha mountain backdrop, and along the coast. You can also request a route toward Benalmadena, subject to sea conditions.

What is included in the jet ski rental price?

The price includes a licensed guide, fuel, life jackets, insurance, Spanish IVA (21%), and a cooler with water, soft drinks, beer, and light snacks. No hidden extras.

How do I book a jet ski in Benalmadena?

Contact us directly via WhatsApp to check availability and confirm your booking. We require a deposit to secure the time slot. Same-day bookings are possible if the jet ski is available.

What is the best time of year for jet ski rental in Benalmadena?

The season runs from April to October, with peak conditions in July and August when water temperatures reach 24°C. May and September offer lighter crowds and calm seas. Winter rentals are possible but weather-dependent.
